items.title: Elon Musk says Tesla plans to use Intel's 14A process technology to make chips at its Terafab project, which would make Tesla the first major customer for 14A (Reuters)
items.title_original: Elon Musk says Tesla plans to use Intel's 14A process technology to make chips at its Terafab project, which would make Tesla the first major customer for 14A (Reuters)
items.title_en: Elon Musk says Tesla plans to use Intel's 14A process technology to make chips at its Terafab project, which would make Tesla the first major customer for 14A (Reuters)
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克表示，特斯拉计划使用英特尔的 14A 工艺技术在其 Terafab 项目中制造芯片，这将使特斯拉成为 14A 的第一个主要客户（路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 埃隆·马斯克表示，特斯拉计划使用英特尔的 14A 工艺技术在其 Terafab 项目中制造芯片，这将使特斯拉成为 14A 的第一个主要客户（路透社） / Elon Musk says Tesla plans to use Intel's 14A process technology to make chips at its Terafab project, which would make Tesla the first major customer for 14A (Reuters)

items.title: TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 台积电表示，为了节省资金，将推迟在 2029 年之前使用 ASML 最先进的高数值孔径 EUV 机器（每台成本高达 3.5 亿欧元）进行芯片生产（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 台积电表示，为了节省资金，将推迟在 2029 年之前使用 ASML 最先进的高数值孔径 EUV 机器（每台成本高达 3.5 亿欧元）进行芯片生产（彭博社） / TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)

items.title: TSMC unveils its process technology roadmap through 2029, aiming to launch a new node yearly for client applications and every two years for AI and HPC (Anton Shilov/Tom's Hardware)
items.title_original: TSMC unveils its process technology roadmap through 2029, aiming to launch a new node yearly for client applications and every two years for AI and HPC (Anton Shilov/Tom's Hardware)
items.title_en: TSMC unveils its process technology roadmap through 2029, aiming to launch a new node yearly for client applications and every two years for AI and HPC (Anton Shilov/Tom's Hardware)
items.title_zh: 台积电公布了到 2029 年的工艺技术路线图，旨在每年为客户端应用程序推出一个新节点，每两年为人工智能和 HPC 推出一个新节点（Anton Shilov/Tom's Hardware）
items.title_bilingual: 台积电公布了到 2029 年的工艺技术路线图，旨在每年为客户端应用程序推出一个新节点，每两年为人工智能和 HPC 推出一个新节点（Anton Shilov/Tom's Hardware） / TSMC unveils its process technology roadmap through 2029, aiming to launch a new node yearly for client applications and every two years for AI and HPC (Anton Shilov/Tom's Hardware)

items.title: US child safety group NCMEC received 1.5M reports of suspected CSAM with ties to AI in 2025, a significant surge compared to 67,000 in 2024 and 4,700 in 2023 (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: US child safety group NCMEC received 1.5M reports of suspected CSAM with ties to AI in 2025, a significant surge compared to 67,000 in 2024 and 4,700 in 2023 (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: US child safety group NCMEC received 1.5M reports of suspected CSAM with ties to AI in 2025, a significant surge compared to 67,000 in 2024 and 4,700 in 2023 (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 美国儿童安全组织 NCMEC 到 2025 年收到 150 万份疑似与人工智能有关的 CSAM 报告，较 2024 年的 67,000 份和 2023 年的 4,700 份大幅增加（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 美国儿童安全组织 NCMEC 到 2025 年收到 150 万份疑似与人工智能有关的 CSAM 报告，较 2024 年的 67,000 份和 2023 年的 4,700 份大幅增加（彭博社） / US child safety group NCMEC received 1.5M reports of suspected CSAM with ties to AI in 2025, a significant surge compared to 67,000 in 2024 and 4,700 in 2023 (Bloomberg)
